emails.subject: Sample GTC's
emails.body: Sample GTC's Mark, Further to our conversation the other day, are you happy for us to change the following in the GTC screen in EnronOnline: Old: "(Guest Users will view Generic GTCs which are shown for information purposes only)" New: "(Guest Users will view sample GTC's which may differ in some respects from execution versions)" Dave
